---
title: "#sticker_joy"
---

## 2018-10-26

**Michael Love** (15:33:22):
> @Michael Love has joined the channel

**Michael Love** (15:33:38):
> Fun!
  - File (PNG): [tximeta.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/FDNTHPXHP/tximeta.png)

**Federico Marini** (15:44:02):
> @Federico Marini has joined the channel

**Federico Marini** (15:44:20):
> nice one:slightly_smiling_face:

**Federico Marini** (15:45:46):
> we are close to finalize the one for`iSEE`

**Federico Marini** (15:46:26):
  - File (PNG): [iSEE.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/FDNR7CZ4G/isee.png)

**Federico Marini** (15:46:30):
> This is the current stand

**Michael Love** (16:19:32):
> Ooooh

**Michael Love** (16:19:54):
> Love it

**Michael Love** (16:20:08):
> If you see tSNE you should probably see a doctor

**Federico Marini** (16:27:31):
> I should be (uh uh) perplex

**Davide Risso** (19:01:20):
> @Davide Risso has joined the channel


## 2018-10-28

**Stuart Lee** (02:19:57):
> @Stuart Lee has joined the channel


## 2018-10-29

**Lucas Schiffer** (11:50:35):
> @Lucas Schiffer has joined the channel

**Michael Love** (18:31:16):
> Ok post your sticker prototypes :)


## 2018-10-30

**Charlotte Soneson** (13:51:06):
> @Charlotte Soneson has joined the channel

**Charlotte Soneson** (14:24:49):
> Hello! I was wondering whether anyone was thinking about a sticker for`ExperimentHub`? I started playing with a prototype, happy for comments/pointers/ideas for alternative designs:slightly_smiling_face:
  - File (PDF): [ExperimentHub.pdf](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/FDS4JCQDT/experimenthub.pdf)

**Michael Love** (14:32:09):
> nice!

**Stuart Lee** (18:21:59) (in thread):
> Looks great!


## 2018-10-31

**Charlotte Soneson** (06:40:13) (in thread):
> Thanks Stuart:slightly_smiling_face:


## 2018-11-23

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (10:28:00):
> @Kevin Rue-Albrecht has joined the channel


## 2018-11-26

**Kayla Interdonato** (12:56:58):
> @Kayla Interdonato has joined the channel


## 2018-12-13

**BJ Stubbs** (15:56:41):
> @BJ Stubbs has joined the channel


## 2018-12-18

**Lluís Revilla** (04:04:27):
> @Lluís Revilla has joined the channel


## 2019-01-08

**Laurent Gatto** (02:04:05):
> @Laurent Gatto has joined the channel


## 2019-01-21

**Lucas Schiffer** (09:46:04):
> @Lucas Schiffer has left the channel


## 2019-10-16

**Michael Love** (09:24:16):
  - File (PNG): [Screen Shot 2019-10-04 at 10.32.44 AM.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/FP22Z6RFX/screen_shot_2019-10-04_at_10.32.44_am.png)

**Michael Love** (09:25:22):
> WIP for hex sticker for ExploreModelMatrix, package by@Charlotte Soneson,@Federico Marini, little contribution from me

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (09:29:31):
> Nice! The blue “~” makes me think about a wave in the sea, and “explore” could be illustrated by a boat sailing on it.. if you wanted to try.
> Though the magnifying glass captures the concept better:slightly_smiling_face:

**Federico Marini** (09:30:14):
> I think the color is the BioCblue if I did pick the hex correctly:smile:

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (09:33:32):
> “Did you know” moment:
> The colours of the`TVTB`sticker are picked from the Italian flag ([http://www.colorguides.net/pantone_flag_colors.html](http://www.colorguides.net/pantone_flag_colors.html))
  - Attachment (colorguides.net): [Pantone Color Guides: book, books, charts, matching system, and colors](http://www.colorguides.net/pantone_flag_colors.html)
> Pantone color guides, textile guides and chip books. Fast, Free Shipping.

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (09:34:50) (in thread):
  - File (PNG): [image.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/FPHKGLJG6/image.png)

**Federico Marini** (09:42:36):
> To reprise the meme of “I was today years old”:smile:

**Federico Marini** (09:42:54):
> Could be an extra episode of Sheldon Cooper’s fun with flags

**Michael Love** (09:59:28) (in thread):
> "at sea" does probably capture how many people feel choosing the design formula!

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (10:07:17) (in thread):
> Lol. I didn’t even think of that… but yeah:rolling_on_the_floor_laughing:


## 2019-11-21

**Stephany Orjuela** (10:36:27):
> @Stephany Orjuela has joined the channel


## 2019-12-03

**Dan Bunis** (15:37:43):
> @Dan Bunis has joined the channel


## 2019-12-10

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (16:21:03):
> It’s so hypnotic :)
  - File (GIF): [Bioconductor.gif](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/FR55SS8GJ/bioconductor.gif)

**Michael Love** (18:41:59):
> Nice!


## 2020-01-07

**Michael Love** (13:28:26):
> @Federico Mariniping ping

**Federico Marini** (14:22:17):
> Answering the call…

**Federico Marini** (14:22:21):
> :slightly_smiling_face:

**Federico Marini** (14:23:00):
> Here’s the final version for the (hopefully soon in Bioc) GeneTonic package (ATM here:[https://github.com/federicomarini/GeneTonic](https://github.com/federicomarini/GeneTonic))

**Federico Marini** (14:23:18):
  - File (PNG): [GeneTonic.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/FSCQ0QL69/genetonic.png)

**Federico Marini** (14:23:48):
> First batch of sticker will soon be on its way:slightly_smiling_face:I’m happy to send some around by good ol’ mail!

**Michael Love** (14:31:07):
> :cocktail:

**Michael Love** (14:35:01):
> macrophage is great bc the gene sets, like, make sense

**Michael Love** (14:35:44):
  - File (PNG): [Screenshot from 2020-01-07 14-35-27.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/FSCAVCUEQ/screenshot_from_2020-01-07_14-35-27.png)

**Michael Love** (14:36:34):
> ooh rollover w heatmap

**Michael Love** (14:36:46):
  - File (PNG): [Screenshot from 2020-01-07 14-36-26.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/FSCQP6H7X/screenshot_from_2020-01-07_14-36-26.png)

**Federico Marini** (14:55:42):
> > macrophage is great bc the gene sets, like, make sense
> Cheers to that :)

**Federico Marini** (14:56:37):
> Nothing against airway, huh. But I had the impression I could recite the first rows of the counts table by now:smile:

**Michael Love** (15:08:55):
> yeah, due for a change

**Michael Love** (15:09:10):
> also the macrophage data is quite cool beyond the data in Bioc, they did response eQTLs

**Michael Love** (15:09:15):
> and caQTLs

**Federico Marini** (15:14:31):
> Yup. But seriously, alone gene sets making sense is a game changer (as naive as it sounds)


## 2020-01-31

**Federico Marini** (13:33:38):
  - File (JPEG): [Photo on 31.01.20 at 19.15 #2.jpg](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/FT0NNLF8A/photo_on_31.01.20_at_19.15__2.jpg)

**Federico Marini** (13:33:59):
> Stepping up the game in the hex sticker world - stickermule now has holo/metallic look as well:dealwithit-parrot:


## 2020-05-07

**Dan Bunis** (16:23:54):
> I was just reminded that I want to add my dittoSeq logo as a sticker, but before I do make a hex version, does anyone know if my art (outline path created by me in illustrator) is actionably too similar to the actual pokemon ditto?  Not trying to get myself or Bioconductor sued![https://github.com/dtm2451/dittoSeq/blob/master/vignettes/dittoLogo_mini.png](https://github.com/dtm2451/dittoSeq/blob/master/vignettes/dittoLogo_mini.png)[https://www.pokemon.com/us/pokedex/ditto](https://www.pokemon.com/us/pokedex/ditto)
  - Attachment (pokemon.com): [Ditto | Pokédex | More at Pokemon.com](https://www.pokemon.com/us/pokedex/ditto)
> It transforms into whatever it sees. If the thing it's transforming into isn't right in front of it, Ditto relies on its memory—so sometimes it fails.

**Federico Marini** (16:30:40):
> I would not ask the Pokemon copyright holders:stuck_out_tongue:Jokes apart: I had a package called haRibo with color palettes inspired by the colors of gummy bears.
> Someone told me, “you should get in touch with them and ask whether it is fine to do so”. I did that, and Haribo told me to please change the name. So now that package is[https://github.com/federicomarini/haR](https://github.com/federicomarini/haR)

**Federico Marini** (16:31:25):
> (and  I still don’t get why the gummy bears in us have a- one color less, b- more artificial colors)

**Dan Bunis** (19:29:15):
> But haRibo is so great!

**Dan Bunis** (19:30:12) (in thread):
> this I had no idea was a thing!:face_with_raised_eyebrow:

**Stuart Lee** (19:31:28):
> i think it does look pretty similar to ditto! i wonder if you could do the animation style when ditto transforms; like a blob of messy data turning into a beautfiul graph

**Dan Bunis** (19:40:24):
> It looks similar on purpose!  I just wasn’t sure if it mattered but… I guess I should finally bite the bullet and change it:sob:.

**Dan Bunis** (19:42:26):
> I love your transformation idea though! A transformation effect is certainly more general and less obviously specific to ditto than an outline shape.
> I’ll have to come up with a static way to get that idea across for a sticker, but I’m sure I can find a creative solution for that =)

**Stuart Lee** (19:47:40):
> looking forward to seeing your next iteration:slightly_smiling_face:also as someone who also named an r package after a pokemon i feel your pain on the hex sticker front haha

**Dan Bunis** (20:01:49):
> thanks! I’ll post it here if I think it’s any good.


## 2020-05-08

**Federico Marini** (04:08:03) (in thread):
> I know. Thing is, it uses their full name:disappointed:

**Federico Marini** (04:08:39):
> Maybe just flipping the horizontal is enough?

**Federico Marini** (04:08:59):
> this is what some do to avoid copyright issues on youtube - no clue how successful these actions are

**Federico Marini** (04:09:18) (in thread):
> me neither till i checked out

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (05:57:07):
> [https://github.com/Bioconductor/BiocStickers/pull/112](https://github.com/Bioconductor/BiocStickers/pull/112)

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (05:57:29):
  - File (GIF): [Bioconductor-compressed.gif](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F0138JX6H8D/bioconductor-compressed.gif)

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (06:15:42):
> credits to@Federico Marinifor the idea: simultaneous synthesis of both strands.
  - File (GIF): [ezgif-5-85ac9fd49402.gif](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F013A1FSW5Q/ezgif-5-85ac9fd49402.gif)

**Unknown User** (06:15:49):
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: section]
> 
> [Unsupported block type: context]

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (06:44:09):
> :bioc-load:

**Michael Love** (07:35:40):
> that is cool:laughing:

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (08:05:46):
> subtlety: the two strands start at the same time, blue finishes an extra couple of circles later:[https://github.com/Bioconductor/BiocStickers/blob/master/Bioconductor/Bioconductor-parallel.gif](https://github.com/Bioconductor/BiocStickers/blob/master/Bioconductor/Bioconductor-parallel.gif)
  - File (GIF): [Bioconductor-parallel.gif](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F013NQ751UH/bioconductor-parallel.gif)

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (08:06:06):
> this is the one I PR'ed into BiocStickers


## 2020-05-14

**Charlotte Soneson** (05:24:20):
> Sticker for the new`eisaR`Bioc package:slightly_smiling_face:
  - File (PNG): [eisaR.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F013EPJS294/eisar.png)


## 2020-05-16

**Avi Srivastava** (14:08:40):
> @Avi Srivastava has joined the channel

**Dan Bunis** (15:40:31):
> ***Fully evolved***
  - File (PNG): [dittoSeq2020.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F013YMLG1K6/dittoseq2020.png)


## 2020-06-12

**Johannes Rainer** (09:50:02):
> @Johannes Rainer has joined the channel


## 2020-06-16

**Laurent Gatto** (12:50:47):
  - Attachment: [Attachment](https://community-bioc.slack.com/archives/CL21357E2/p1592326156008100)
> Hello - I just wanted to point out here that we have a new diversity-affirming section in the BiocStickers repo ([https://github.com/Bioconductor/BiocStickers/blob/master/README.md](https://github.com/Bioconductor/BiocStickers/blob/master/README.md)) featuring rainbow and trans versions of our Bioconductor sticker. Credits to @Aaron Lun and @Dan Bunis. Thank you!


## 2020-06-23

**Johannes Rainer** (12:58:00):
> New version of the sticker for the BioC2020 conference - as it will be online only

**Johannes Rainer** (12:59:29):
> Some explanations:
> * the "B" on the mug should be a reference to Boston, the original location of the conference.
> * there's the SARS-CoV-2 hovering over the desk as suggested by@Levi Waldron
> * in all this darkness, there is the BioC logo shining in the middle - maybe some light at the end of the tunnel?
  - File (PNG): [BioC2020.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F0169N04F0R/bioc2020.png)

**Michael Love** (12:59:50):
> that is great Johannes

**Michael Love** (13:00:39):
> BioC2020 - the one in pajamas

**Federico Marini** (13:12:51):
> Bioc2020, dress code: from the waist up

**Federico Marini** (13:33:02) (in thread):
> slumbRparty planned:slightly_smiling_face:


## 2020-07-24

**Johannes Rainer** (13:52:19):
> Sticker for the Community Advisory Board (also available[here](https://github.com/Bioconductor/BiocStickers/tree/master/boards/CAB))
  - File (PNG): [CAB.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F017NB7TREZ/cab.png)

**Johannes Rainer** (13:53:34):
> And also for the Technical Advisory Board (also available[here](https://github.com/Bioconductor/BiocStickers/tree/master/boards/TAB))
  - File (PNG): [TAB.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F017PUCC4LT/tab.png)

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (14:02:26):
> CAB, TAB, ... I guess all that's left is starting a Legal Advisory Board:stuck_out_tongue:

**Michael Love** (19:27:24):
> These are so cool


## 2020-09-07

**Lluís Revilla** (09:23:38):
> Finally remembered to add the new logo to Bioconductor/BiocStickers (Thanks@David Mas-Ponte)
  - File (PNG): [BioCor.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F01AL5Z9ZR7/biocor.png)


## 2020-09-13

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (04:48:38):
> [https://github.com/kevinrue/velociraptor](https://github.com/kevinrue/velociraptor)
  - File (JPEG): [Image from iOS](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F01AL4NNRGT/image_from_ios.jpg)


## 2020-10-11

**Kozo Nishida** (21:43:07):
> @Kozo Nishida has joined the channel


## 2020-10-20

**Matt Ritchie** (06:01:31):
> @Matt Ritchie has joined the channel


## 2020-10-22

**Matt Ritchie** (06:48:25):
> [https://github.com/Shians/NanoMethViz](https://github.com/Shians/NanoMethViz)from@Shian Su, logo designed by Kathleen Zeglinski
  - File (PNG): [vertical bowl 2@2x.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F01DA2SNY1J/vertical_bowl_2_2x.png)

**Michael Love** (08:40:05):
> wow how was it done? illustrator?


## 2020-12-01

**Johannes Rainer** (10:18:57):
> Sticker/logo for the European Bioc organization/foundation (or whatever this will be called):
  - File (PNG): [EuroBioC.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F01FPNCLC5U/eurobioc.png)


## 2020-12-02

**Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles)** (06:12:14):
> @Konstantinos Geles (Constantinos Yeles) has joined the channel


## 2020-12-03

**Johannes Rainer** (03:09:34):
> Sticker for the education and training**network**:
  - File (PNG): [BiocTeaching.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F01FMCA02R5/biocteaching.png)


## 2020-12-09

**Michael Love** (09:41:13):
> needed an AHub sticker for a presentation...
  - File (PNG): [AnnotationHub.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F01GEFL89NZ/annotationhub.png)

**Michael Love** (09:42:04):
> i went with literalist


## 2020-12-12

**Huipeng Li** (00:38:08):
> @Huipeng Li has joined the channel


## 2020-12-13

**Kelly Eckenrode** (13:42:22):
> @Kelly Eckenrode has joined the channel


## 2020-12-19

**Davide Risso** (10:24:36):
> mbkmeans sticker:
  - File (PNG): [mbkmeans.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F01HAC7HF7C/mbkmeans.png)


## 2021-01-22

**Jonathan Speh** (05:11:56):
> @Jonathan Speh has joined the channel


## 2021-02-12

**Johannes Rainer** (05:52:29):
> `MetaboCoreUtils`sticker:
  - File (PNG): [MetaboCoreUtils.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F01MGMR1TM5/metabocoreutils.png)

**Johannes Rainer** (05:53:07):
> And`MsFeatures`sticker:
  - File (PNG): [MsFeatures.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F01N3L0M328/msfeatures.png)

**Michael Love** (07:55:24):
> :exploding_head:very cool

**Michael Love** (07:55:39):
> make me want to analyze some metabolomics data


## 2021-02-13

**Wes W** (12:34:18):
> @Wes W has joined the channel


## 2021-03-12

**Johannes Rainer** (04:49:56):
> Sticker for the recently added`MsBackendMassbank`package:
  - File (PNG): [MsBackendMassbank.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F01QYPXKU21/msbackendmassbank.png)

**Wes W** (17:05:38) (in thread):
> @Johannes Rainerwas there any more of these left over?


## 2021-03-15

**Johannes Rainer** (03:26:25) (in thread):
> I did only design them. Maybe you can ask one of the organizers of the BioC2020? Could be they have some left over


## 2021-03-21

**Wes W** (13:10:42) (in thread):
> Thanks!


## 2021-05-11

**Megha Lal** (16:46:01):
> @Megha Lal has joined the channel


## 2021-10-11

**Michael Love** (08:50:23):
> This package by@Wancen Muwent in last release cycle, methods for partitioning and estimating allelic imbalance (AI) for scRNA-seq or multi-condition bulk RNA-seq (AI + R + PARTition)
  - File (PNG): [airpart.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F02HQH83Q2D/airpart.png)

**Wancen Mu** (09:30:16):
> @Wancen Mu has joined the channel


## 2021-10-13

**Johannes Rainer** (11:05:10):
> The sticker for the next EuroBioC conference:
  - File (PNG): [EuroBioC2022.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F02HN8ZMVGT/eurobioc2022.png)

**Wes W** (11:07:00) (in thread):
> do want!


## 2021-10-26

**Wes W** (22:48:08):
> for anyone wanting to get some stickers done, Sticker Mule is having there 5 times a year sale (its not a super limited sale , they do it often) on limited die cut stickers , so if you just want enough for your team/contributors to you packages now is a good time to stalk up -->[https://www.stickermule.com/products/sticker-samples?utm_source=google&utm_medium=cpc&\[…\]Mi-9CYM5EtsTQb3BTj3ZbRMmbXW_stHdbBSJ8bFf25QWUxoC9-sQAvD_BwE](https://www.stickermule.com/products/sticker-samples?utm_source=google&utm_medium=cpc&src=GOOG&cid=11761851334&gclid=CjwKCAjwzt6LBhBeEiwAbPGOgfk8UmsjMi-9CYM5EtsTQb3BTj3ZbRMmbXW_stHdbBSJ8bFf25QWUxoC9-sQAvD_BwE)
  - Attachment (Sticker Mule): [Custom sticker samples | Sticker Mule](https://www.stickermule.com/products/sticker-samples?utm_source=google&amp;utm_medium=cpc&amp;src=GOOG&amp;cid=11761851334&amp;gclid=CjwKCAjwzt6LBhBeEiwAbPGOgfk8UmsjMi-9CYM5EtsTQb3BTj3ZbRMmbXW_stHdbBSJ8bFf25QWUxoC9-sQAvD_BwE)
> Order a sample batch of 10 custom stickers using your artwork to find out why customers including GitHub, Reddit, Shopify and Coca-Cola use Sticker Mule. Free shipping.


## 2021-11-08

**Paula Nieto García** (03:30:13):
> @Paula Nieto García has joined the channel


## 2021-11-11

**Dania Machlab** (07:55:17):
> @Dania Machlab has joined the channel

**Dania Machlab** (07:57:57):
> sticker for the new`monaLisa`package:slightly_smiling_face:
  - File (PNG): [monaLisa.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F02MCL8R8JV/monalisa.png)


## 2021-12-14

**Megha Lal** (08:23:50):
> @Megha Lal has left the channel


## 2022-01-13

**Kozo Nishida** (00:36:20):
> (This is just an idea, but I would like to hear your thoughts.)
> What do you think about distributing Bioconductor stickers as NFT art?
> NFTs can be used to add the concept of ownership to digital data.
> Until now, only the physical object of the sticker had the concept of ownership, but NFT also brings the concept of ownership to digital data.
> NFT can prove uniqueness, cannot be altered, and can record the creator/owner of the data.
> For example, a friend of mine makes stickers for his programming community and for his company, and give the stickers to their community/company members or supporters at[https://opensea.io/assets/matic/0x2953399124f0cbb46d2cbacd8a89cf0599974963/8604448\[…\]512675614174039419791238983411265203610642364327771931737587754](https://opensea.io/assets/matic/0x2953399124f0cbb46d2cbacd8a89cf0599974963/86044480873941512675614174039419791238983411265203610642364327771931737587754)
  - Attachment (OpenSea): [hanpy-2022 - chomoku_logos | OpenSea](https://opensea.io/assets/matic/0x2953399124f0cbb46d2cbacd8a89cf0599974963/86044480873941512675614174039419791238983411265203610642364327771931737587754)
> Hannari Python is kyoto based Python community

**Lluís Revilla** (04:07:15):
> How does NFT adds to the concept of ownership without any modification or transfer of the intellectual property? My understanding is that NFTs add traceability (that depends on a third party not fool proof) via blockchain technology at the cost of an expensive transaction.


## 2022-01-15

**Kozo Nishida** (06:25:58):
> Sorry, my explanation was not enough.
> NFT itself does not give the ownership but the uniqueness.
> Selling (or distributing free) NFT art on OpenSea gives you ownership. Like the link in my previous message.


## 2022-01-19

**Stephany Orjuela** (10:09:57):
> @Stephany Orjuela has left the channel


## 2022-02-01

**Lindsay Clark** (10:02:16):
> @Lindsay Clark has joined the channel


## 2022-02-07

**Johannes Rainer** (06:21:16):
> Sticker for the new`CompoundDb`packge:
  - File (PNG): [CompoundDb.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F031ZSA7DCL/compounddb.png)

**Johannes Rainer** (06:21:49):
> And for the new`MetaboAnnotation`package:
  - File (PNG): [MetaboAnnotation.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F031ZSCH03W/metaboannotation.png)

**Michael Love** (06:39:28):
> The proteomics / metabolomics sticker game is strong


## 2022-02-16

**Lucas Schiffer** (13:55:13):
> @Lucas Schiffer has joined the channel

**Lucas Schiffer** (13:58:00):
> I meant to post this long ago; from my`tuberculosis`package.
  - File (PNG): [tuberculosis.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F0337A457RC/tuberculosis.png)


## 2022-05-16

**Pedro Sanchez** (07:02:43):
> @Pedro Sanchez has joined the channel

**Pedro Sanchez** (07:02:44):
> @Pedro Sanchez has left the channel


## 2022-08-22

**Wes W** (17:47:20):
> todays monday deal on sticker mule for anyone thinking of getting their stickers printed

**Wes W** (17:47:21):
> [https://www.stickermule.com/deals](https://www.stickermule.com/deals)
  - Attachment (Sticker Mule): [Deals | Sticker Mule](https://www.stickermule.com/deals)
> At Sticker Mule we love to run great deals. Sign up today to be notified about future deals, new products, and an occasional surprise.

**Wes W** (17:48:34) (in thread):
> @Michael Love@Rob Patro@Charlotte Soneson--> i would like one of your stickers

**Michael Love** (20:21:09) (in thread):
> I need to buy some in a bulk order :-)


## 2022-12-21

**Johannes Rainer** (02:42:16):
> Sticker for the Bioconductor 2023 conference:
  - File (PNG): [BioC2023-a.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F04G1QQR545/bioc2023-a.png)


## 2023-02-01

**Johannes Rainer** (05:05:03):
> Yey! sticker for our new`MsBackendSql`BioC package
  - File (PNG): [MsBackendSql.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F04MAPD29RU/msbackendsql.png)


## 2023-07-26

**Wes W** (09:00:13):
> new sticker for my package`scGEM2CELLr`, hopefully submitted to BioC before the conference
  - File (PNG): [scGEM2Cellr.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F05JURXEQ4T/scgem2cellr.png)


## 2023-09-15

**Leo Lahti** (04:56:43):
> @Leo Lahti has joined the channel


## 2024-02-26

**Laurent Gatto** (13:43:03):
> Has anyone ever tried to remove and possibly recover stickers pasted on their laptop?


## 2024-02-29

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (08:51:39) (in thread):
> Yup. Some from a laptop itself, and others from a laptop hardcover/shell.

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (08:52:22) (in thread):
> Takes a bit of patience. Most stickers came off easily while a few almost tore.

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (08:52:56) (in thread):
> All of them eventually came off in good enough condition that they stuck again to the piece of furniture I'm using now

**Laurent Gatto** (09:02:42) (in thread):
> Thanks! If you wait long enough, some unique event stickers becomes more valuable that the laptop:smile:

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (09:17:34) (in thread):
> Found the photo
  - File (PNG): [image.png](https://community-bioc.slack.com/files/U34P8RS3B/F06MN3YPHDF/image.png)

**Kevin Rue-Albrecht** (09:18:11) (in thread):
> How to turn a (originally) ~£20 piece of Argos furniture into a priceless work of art:stuck_out_tongue:


## 2024-04-28

**Danielle Callan** (08:41:26):
> @Danielle Callan has joined the channel


## 2024-05-14

**Lori Shepherd** (10:37:19):
> @Lori Shepherd has joined the channel

**Lori Shepherd** (10:38:07):
> we are trying to clean up and condense down bioconductor community slack channels --  may I suggest we archive this channel and new stickers be posted in#humble-brag?

**Lori Shepherd** (10:39:23):
> archived the channel
